name: fulltab-search
description: Full-tab project search with tabs, filters, and inline results

fullTabSearch.debug.description: Log performance metrics to the FullTab Search output channel.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:ui: npm run compile && EXTENSIONS_FOLDER=.test-extensions EXTENSION_DEV_PATH=. extest setup-and-run "./out/ui-test/**/*.ui.test.js" --code_version max --code_settings ./src/ui-test/ui-test-settings.json --extensions_dir .test-extensions --storage test-resources -m ./src/ui-test/.mocharc.json --open_resource ./src/test/fixtures/sample-workspace
scripts.demo:record: npm run compile && node scripts/prepareDemo.mjs && EXTENSIONS_FOLDER=.test-extensions EXTENSION_DEV_PATH=. extest setup-and-run "./out/ui-test/demo.recording.js" --code_version max --code_settings ./src/ui-test/demo-settings.json --extensions_dir .test-extensions --storage test-resources -m ./src/ui-test/.mocharc.json --open_resource ./.demo-tmp && node scripts/buildDemoGif.mjs
